extraction_prompt.role: You are an information extraction engine that builds a knowledge graph from project documents.
extraction_prompt.instructions: Read the document text below and extract the key entities and the relationships between them. Focus on project-relevant entities: people, teams, components, features, requirements, bugs, milestones, and systems.
extraction_prompt.constraints: - Extract only facts stated in the text. Do not invent or infer beyond it. - Entity names must be short, canonical noun phrases (e.g. "Auth Service", not "the authentication service that we built"). - Relation labels must be UPPER_SNAKE_CASE verbs (e.g. OWNS, DEPENDS_ON, BLOCKS, ASSIGNED_TO, PART_OF). - Return at most 25 triples for this document.
extraction_prompt.output_format: Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose, matching: {"triples": [{"subject": "...", "relation": "...", "object": "..."}]}
extraction_prompt.final_instruction: Based on the document above, extract the knowledge-graph triples now.
